---
title: Fontaine en Italie
author: Raphaële Slimane
image: https://res.cloudinary.com/dyjfju0u4/image/upload/f_auto,q_auto/v1784794106/fontaineitalie_vyyav9.png
description: Fontaine en Italie
categories: [urbansketch]
date: 2023/04/15
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
---

![](https://res.cloudinary.com/dyjfju0u4/image/upload/f_auto,q_auto/v1784794106/fontaineitalie_vyyav9.png)
